subject: chore(pwa): strengthen icon cache-bust sweep + refresh SESSION_NOTES
body:
vite.config.ts:
- iconCacheBustHtml() adds a final sweep: after literal replacements,
  re-scan the HTML for any <link rel="icon|apple-touch-icon"> whose href
  doesn't include ?v=. Throws at build with the offending tag and a
  "add to REPLACEMENTS" hint.
- Closes the gap where a future contributor adds a new icon link
  without updating REPLACEMENTS — literal-only matching would have
  skipped it and shipped un-versioned URLs. Defense-in-depth alongside
  the tripwire test.

docs/SESSION_NOTES.md:
- Rewrites session summary per CLAUDE.md convention (rewrite at session
  end; fresh snapshot, not a changelog). Covers Chunks 9 + 10 end-to-end
  plus the TODO audit. Captures what's still pending for manual browser
  verification.

Tags: pwa, documentation, hardening
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Qj2ueAEuobTogrBRFwAXvc
title: strengthen icon cache-bust sweep + refresh SESSION_NOTES
